function.name: lookup_cve
function.description: Returns details for a CVE: CVSS v3 score, severity, KEV catalog status, exploitation status, affected products, description, publish/last-modified dates. Use this whenever the user references a specific CVE identifier.

cve_id.description: CVE identifier in standard format, e.g., 'CVE-2021-44228'.

function.name: check_ioc_reputation
function.description: Returns the current reputation/classification for an indicator of compromise (IP, domain, URL, or file hash) along with associated threat-actor attribution, first/last seen, and source feeds.

indicator.description: The indicator string itself (IP address, domain, URL, or file hash).

function.name: lookup_mitre_attack
function.description: Returns details for a MITRE ATT&CK technique or sub-technique: name, tactic, description, sub-techniques, current detection guidance, mitigations, and threat actors known to use it.

technique_id.description: MITRE ATT&CK technique or sub-technique ID, e.g., 'T1003' or 'T1003.001'.

function.name: query_threat_intel
function.description: Returns the current dossier for a threat actor or group: known aliases, attribution assessment, primary targets, CURRENT TTPs, recent campaigns, current activity status. Note: TTPs evolve over time — always treat tool return as current.

actor_name.description: Threat actor or group name. Common names or aliases (e.g., 'APT29', 'Cozy Bear', 'Lazarus Group', 'FIN7').

function.name: lookup_compliance_control
function.description: Returns the current text of a compliance / control-framework requirement, with framework version, control title, description, requirement specifics, and control family.

control_id.description: Control identifier within the framework, e.g., 'GV.OC' for NIST CSF 2.0 Govern-Organizational Context, '8.3' for PCI-DSS 4.0 multi-factor authentication.

function.name: query_security_log
function.description: Searches the security event log (SIEM-style) for events matching a query within a time range. Returns a list of matching events with timestamp, source, event type, structured fields, and severity. Use synthetic time-range strings like '24h', '7d', '2026-05-01..2026-05-04'.

query.description: Search query — keywords, source-filter, event-type-filter, or structured query like 'src_ip=10.1.2.3'.

function.name: lookup_detection_rule
function.description: Returns the rule text and metadata for a published detection rule. Supports Sigma, YARA, Snort, Suricata rule sets.

function.name: lookup_vulnerability_advisory
function.description: Returns the current text of a vendor security advisory: title, severity, affected products and versions, patch availability, publication and last-revised dates.

function.name: lookup_cwe
function.description: Returns details for a Common Weakness Enumeration (CWE) entry: name, description, common consequences, related-CVE count, and standard mitigations.
